name: WorldRemit International Money Transfer API
what_it_does: WorldRemit (Zepz Group) international money transfer REST API for financial institutions and enterprise partners to integrate cross-border remittance services covering 130+ countries with bank transfer, mobile money (M-Pesa, MTN Mobile Money), airtime top-up, and cash pickup disbursement options, particularly strong for Africa-to-diaspora and Asia-Pacific corridors. Enables AI agents to manage transfer initiation for international remittance automation, handle recipient wallet and bank account management for cross-border payment workflow automation, access mobile money disbursement for Africa/Asia remittance automation, retrieve exchange rate and fee quote for FX transparency automation, manage airtime top-up for mobile credit remittance automation, handle transfer tracking for remittance delivery confirmation automation, access cash pickup network for agent-based disbursement automation, retrieve corridor availability for supported country-pair automation, manage compliance verification for AML remittance automation, and integrate WorldRemit with diaspora banking, neobank, and enterprise platforms for Africa and Asia corridor remittance automation.
use_cases: Sending remittances to Africa mobile money wallets from diaspora payment agents
Delivering cross-border transfers via M-Pesa from Africa corridor agents
Topping up mobile airtime internationally from prepaid credit agents
Tracking cash pickup availability for international transfer agents
not_for: B2B commercial payments (WorldRemit is consumer/diaspora remittance focused)
Real-time high-value corporate FX (use banking APIs or Airwallex for B2B)
best_when: A financial institution, diaspora-focused neobank, or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate international remittance with strong Africa and mobile money coverage through WorldRemit/Zepz's global disbursement network.
avoid_when: MOBILE MONEY AVAILABILITY IS OPERATOR-DEPENDENT: WorldRemit mobile money (M-Pesa, MTN) availability depends on operator partnership status; automated mobile money disbursement must verify operator availability; automated assumption of universal mobile money creates operator not available error in some corridors. TRANSFER LIMITS DIFFER BY PAYMENT METHOD: WorldRemit limits vary by payment method (bank card, bank transfer) and recipient corridor; automated transfer must check method-specific limits; automated universal limit assumption creates over-limit rejection. COMPLIANCE HOLD DELAYS DELIVERY: WorldRemit applies AML holds to high-risk transfers; automated fulfillment must handle COMPLIANCE_HOLD status; automated immediate delivery assumption creates customer expectation mismatch when hold applied. AIRTIME TOP-UP IS NEAR-INSTANT: WorldRemit airtime top-up typically delivers within minutes but bank transfers take 1-3 days; automated delivery time communication must reflect disbursement method timing; automated unified delivery time creates incorrect expectation.

auth.notes: WorldRemit uses OAuth 2.0 for partner API. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Parent: Zepz Group. Founded 2010 by Ismail Ahmed. Backed by TCV, Leapfrog, Accel ($900M+ raised). Products: Consumer app, Partner API, Sendwave (acquired 2021). No public SDK. FCA-regulated. Licensed in US, EU, Africa. 13M+ customers. 130+ countries. Competes with Remitly and Wise for consumer remittance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Partner API requires agreement; consumer app promotional offers available
pricing.paid_tiers: Partner API pricing negotiated per volume; consumer: fee varies by corridor (typically $1.99-$5.99) plus FX spread
pricing.notes: London UK. Zepz Group. TCV/Accel backed. Partner API pricing negotiated. Consumer per-transfer pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; transfer and quote APIs throttled; webhooks for transfer status events

known_agent_gotchas: MOBILE MONEY OPERATOR AVAILABILITY VARIES: WorldRemit mobile money disbursement depends on per-operator status (M-Pesa KE, MTN UG differ); automated mobile money transfer must check operator availability before presenting option; automated universal mobile money assumption creates transfer creation with unavailable operator error

COMPLIANCE HOLD STATUS IS SEPARATE FROM FAILED: WorldRemit returns COMPLIANCE_HOLD status distinct from FAILED; automated transfer handling must handle COMPLIANCE_HOLD as pending not failed; automated treating compliance hold as failure creates unnecessary cancellation and customer confusion

SENDWAVE INTEGRATION IS SEPARATE PRODUCT: WorldRemit's Sendwave is a distinct product/API from WorldRemit API; automated integration choosing between products requires understanding their separate corridor strengths; automated conflating Sendwave and WorldRemit creates wrong product for target corridor

AIRTIME TOP-UP HAS DENOMINATIONS: WorldRemit airtime top-up amounts must match supported denominations per operator; automated airtime top-up must select from valid denomination list; automated arbitrary amount creates invalid denomination error

RECIPIENT PROFILE REQUIRED BEFORE TRANSFER: WorldRemit requires recipient profile (name, bank/wallet details) created before transfer initiation; automated transfer must create recipient first; automated transfer with inline recipient details creates missing recipient_id error
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global remittance. FCA-regulated. OAuth2. UK/EU. Financial transfer and identity data. AML/KYC.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global remittance. FCA. OAuth2. UK/EU. Financial transfer and identity data.
